sn46.22:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the seven factors of enlightenment. Listen to that … .
sn46.22:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, are the seven factors of enlightenment? The enlightenment factor of mindfulness … the enlightenment factor of equanimity. These are the seven factors of enlightenment." sn.v.84
